title: Pruna models get reliable routing and explicit resolutions
summary:
A quick tune-up for video generation: Pruna models stop hanging indefinitely, and Wan-Pro image-to-video is back online.

We routed Pruna models (p-image, p-image-edit, p-video) through Replicate. The main win here is bounded polling—failed requests now return a crisp 400 error instead of hanging indefinitely. We also split p-video into explicit p-video-720p and p-video-1080p models, so you can choose your resolution instead of relying on inferred heights.

Wan-Pro (wan2.7) image-to-video generation was throwing 500 errors because the upstream API changed its expected payload from a simple string to a media array. We updated the plumbing to match the new format. Pixels are flowing normally again.
